description_long: This beer garden features a rectangular open-air layout with a wooden deck floor and several round tables, each surrounded by multiple chairs. On one end, there is a large L-shaped bar or counter area with a partially covered roof structure, while the opposite end contains a series of stacked crates or benches, possibly for storage or additional seating. The tables and chairs are arranged in a loose grid, providing ample space for movement between them. The color palette is dominated by warm browns and wood tones, giving the space a cozy and inviting atmosphere. No decorative lighting or branded signage is visible, and the overall design is functional with a hint of rustic charm.
description: A rectangular beer garden with wooden decking, round tables and chairs, an L-shaped bar, and stacked benches, all in warm brown tones.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the beer garden, with the L-shaped bar on the right and tables and benches spread across the wooden deck.
description_view_1: End-on view highlighting the stacked benches or crates and the linear arrangement of tables and chairs along the deck.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, with the bar on the left and a clear view of the seating and storage areas.
description_view_3: View from the far end, focusing on the bar structure and the arrangement of tables and benches along the length of the garden.
attribute_outdoor_seating_arrangement: Round tables with individual chairs are arranged in a loose grid across the wooden deck, with benches or crates stacked at one end and an L-shaped bar at the other. No umbrellas or canopies are visible, and spacing allows for easy movement.
